text: Hovering over the "upload image" button in the evaluate feedback form should show the tooltip "Attach image(s)"

proposedTasks.title: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
proposedTasks.description: When hovering over the 'upload image' button in the Evaluate phase feedback submission form, display a tooltip reading 'Attach image(s)'. Acceptance criteria: (1) Tooltip text is exactly 'Attach image(s)'. (2) Tooltip appears on hover with standard delay (~300ms). (3) Tooltip disappears on mouse leave. (4) Tooltip is accessible (aria-label or title attribute).

taskTitles: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
